message:
feat(conformance): add gradient verification to normalize tests, dot/min/max binary ops, and einsum helper extraction

- Conformance: add grad_ok field to TensorNormalizeCaseReport and wire
  backward pass + gradient extraction into the normalize test runner when
  expected_grad is present in fixture data, enabling gradient correctness
  verification alongside forward pass checks
- Binary ops: add dot, min, and max to the supported tensor binary
  operation dispatch, with corresponding fixture cases
- Normalize fixtures: add expected_grad entries and tolerance fields to
  existing cases for gradient validation coverage
- Reduction fixtures: add new reduction test cases
- API (einsum): extract repeated position-lookup closures (lhs_pos,
  rhs_pos) to eliminate redundant linear scans across batch/free/contract
  char sets, improving readability and reducing allocation in the
  permutation and shape-computation paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
